channel.title: Disaster-Recovery on StageSet Controller
channel.description: Recent content in Disaster-Recovery on StageSet Controller

item.title: Backup and disaster recovery
item.description: Back up the small set of state the controller cannot reconstruct, then rebuild a lost cluster by restoring that state in the right order. Most of what a StageSet manages is recomputed on the next reconcile from your Git repository and your Flux sources, so it needs no backup of its own. Three things are the exception, and losing any of them causes silent data damage rather than a clean failure.
